Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Other Chronic or Potentially Disabling Conditions Segment Codebook │ August 2025 │ V 1.7 18 

CYSFIB_MEDICARE_EVER 

LABEL: Cystic Fibrosis and Other Metabolic Developmental Disorders First Ever Occurrence Date — Medicare 
Only Claims 

DESCRIPTION: This variable shows the date when the beneficiary first met the criteria for the cystic fibrosis and other 
metabolic developmental disorders indicator. The variable will be blank for
